name: @ai-eng-system/daily-brief-sdk
description: Scheduled-brief SDK for cook-and-brief: tomorrow / morning / week-ahead / dream-digest workflows that gather Jira+Bitbucket+Grafana+calendar data and email an HTML brief.

scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun build src/cli.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --banner '#!/usr/bin/env node' && mv dist/cli.js dist/cli.mjs && chmod +x dist/cli.mjs
